next_action: Repeat the clean explicit live-suite run under the typed policy, then use the stability gate to decide whether suite-expansion review is allowed before adding dashboard/API commands.
overclaim_boundary: Repeated clean three-task live evidence can permit suite-expansion review only; it does not prove productivity lift or command-surface readiness below the 20-task gate.
rationale: Goal 028 produced one clean latest explicit live run after typed output-capture and baseline-scope repair. Goal 029 narrows the next step to repeat-clean live stability evidence before suite expansion, prompt tuning, dashboard commands, or productivity claims.
